name: Daiquiri (frozen)
title: Daiquiri (frozen) Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Daiquiri (frozen) | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A slushy frozen daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, fresh lime juice, sugar, and crushed ice.
marketing_description: If you ever imagine yourself sitting seaside under the sun without a worry in the world, chances are you have a Frozen Daiquiri in hand. It’s luscious richness satisfies a craving for something sweet yet a little tart.

steps: Combine all the ingredients in a blender.
Add 3/4 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Daiquiri (frozen) 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 25 ml fresh lime juice 3 tsp extra fine sugar 3/4 cup(s) crushed ice lime wheel as garnish ... Step 1 Combine all the ingredients in a blender. Step 2 Blend Add 3/4 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Step 3 Serve in a cocktail glass. Step 4 Garnish with a lime wheel.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Frozen Daiquiri Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
